title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's research team built Composer 2, a code generation model starting from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active) with continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The training approach includes auto-install bootstrapping, nonlinear reward shaping with self-summarization for context extension, and is evaluated internally using Cursor Bench on real engineer queries.
